characters.name: Adakite Flowstone
characters.description: Adakite FlowstoneMysticon RoleLongtime best friend toImani FirewingMysticon Rogue(self-proclaimed)Frequent ally to the original Mysticons (formerly)Secret employer toNecrafaPrisoner of the ChillwasteFriendsThe Mysticons:Imani Firewing(former childhood friend)Original Mysticon Ranger(formerly)Original Mysticon Knight(formerly)Original Mysticon Striker(formerly)Astromancers:Nova Terron(formerly)Alpha Galaga(formerly)Current Allies:Queen NecrafaGenderFemaleAdakite Flowstonewas a close friend toImani Firewing, from the time before the four original Mysticons were called forth by the mightyDragon Diskto use theirmystical powersand strong weaponry to stop the Spectral Hand from annihilating the realm ofGemina. Astromancers: Current Allies:

characters.name: Alpha Galaga
characters.description: Alpha GalagaMysticon RoleA supremely powerful top-level Sorcerer and WizardStar Master/Mentor to a youngNova TerronWorked with the four original MysticonsFriendsMysticons:Imani FirewingOriginal Mysticon RangerOriginal Mysticon StrikerOriginal Mysticon KnightPupilsNova TerronEnemies:Adakite Flowstone(later on)The Spectral HandQueen NecrafaGeneral BaneGenderMaleAlpha Galagawas the star master and mentor ofNova Terronhimself during his younger years as a Starling and Spellslinger, thousands of years ago. It was he who had predictedthe prophecythat foretold imminent doom and reference to thePrincessTwinsof Gemina themselves. Pupils Enemies:

characters.name: Amileth
characters.description: AmilethMysticon RoleAmileth the Extraordinary Illusionist (proclaimed)The Amazing Amileth and Her Extraordinary EscapesFamilyUnknown estranged elvesFriendsZarya Moonwolf(fast friend)Emerald GoldenbraidPiper WillowbrookPrincess ArkaynaAllies:Dreadbane(temporary)Skeleton Army (formerly)GenderFemaleAmilethis a new character who is introduced in the ever-expanding series ofchapter books("original adventures") featuring each Mysticon as the focal character; her debut appearance beingThe Stolen Magicwhich focuses onZarya Moonwolf, the long-lost, youngerPrincess Twin of Geminaand secondMysticon Ranger. Allies: Amileth is a "young" elf, who happened to be born into a very magical family of elfin-sorcerers. Unfortunately for her, all types of magical, mystical ability had skipped her generation.  This is the main reason for her disdain and resentment towards all magic and those who possess it, whether at random or having developed naturally.

characters.name: Archer
characters.description: ArcherMysticon RoleFaithful griffin mount to the long-lost Princess Zarya Moonwolf of Gemina, the second Mysticon RangerFriendsFellow Griffins:TopazMiss PaisleyIzzieRider:Prince Gawayne(formerly)ZaryaQueen Goodfey(formerly)GenderMaleArcherisZarya's griffin mount and the only male griffin of the quartet. He was Prince Gawayne's griffin before becoming the official mount of the secondMysticon Ranger. He was eventually replaced by theblue dragonwho helped weaken the Spectral Hand. Rider: Before settling on Archer, Zarya briefly called him Stinky, Toby, Buster and Rocco.

characters.name: Arkayna's female guard
characters.description: Arkayna's female guardis a recurring character of Mysticons. She first appears inAn Eye for an Eye. She is voiced by VOICE ACTOR. She says "we're coming your highness then "are you okay" afterArkayna Goodfeyrepels an attacker on the balconey whilst writing in her diary inAn Eye for an Eye.

characters.name: Arkayna's sister
characters.description: Arkayna's sisteris a recurring character of importance in the show. She is mentioned inThe Prophecy, where it is revealed byNova TerronthatQueen Goodfeyhad given birth to twin girls, one with violet eyes, the other with eyes of green. However, Nova had been instructed by his Star Master to take one of the twins and cast her through a portal to the Astral Plane in order to prevent a prophecy of doom to befallGemina.

characters.name: Captain Kaos
characters.description: Captain Kaosis a minor character of Mysticons. He first appears in "Mutiny Most Fowl". He is voiced by Jamie Watson. He made his final appearance in a flashback in"Fear the Spectral Hand." He's a huge red parrot with an orange beard, wears a pirate outfit and has large silver mechanical wings. He is the leader of an opposing pirate crew and an old enemy of Zarya, Kitty Boon and the rest of the Pink Skulls. He is the leader of an opposing pirate crew and an old enemy of Zarya, Kitty Boon and the rest of the Pink Skulls.
characters.personality_section: He is the leader of an opposing pirate crew and an old enemy of Zarya, Kitty Boon and the rest of the Pink Skulls.

characters.name: Centuars
characters.description: CentuarsMysticon RoleInhabitants ofCentaur ParkFamilyFellow CentaursFriendsEach otherEnemiesWood SpritesThe Spectral HanditselfGenderMaleCentaursare pint-sized creatures who are half-horse and half-human. They dwell within a magical park that consists of their own name. According to Piper, they can pretty intense, despite their tiny size and squeaky voices. Enemies They carry harpoons that contain paralyzing poison that makes speech slurred.

characters.name: Choko
characters.description: ChokoMysticon RoleIs Zarya's pet foz and most faithful sidekickFamilyFellowfozFriendsBest Friends:Zarya Moonwolf(owner)Princess ArkaynaPiperEmeraldMalvaronFellow Sidekicks:Doug HadderstormEnemies:TazmaQueen NecrafaVexiconsMalloryKashaEarthaWillaDeeva(counterpart)GenderMale Fellow Sidekicks: Enemies: Choko is a very smart and resourceful foz, he is loyal to the Mysticons but his true loyal is to Zarya. He is often worried about her and has a strong bond with her above the others. Though the story of how they met is yet to be known.

characters.name: Clawdette
characters.description: Clawdette(aliasThe Claw) is a mask-wearing dragon hunter sent byGawayneto captureStormyinThe Last Dragon. She also mentioned Claw-related names for her father and grandfather.

characters.name: Clutch and Throttle
characters.description: Clutch and ThrottleMysticon RoleBounty Hunters for Kymraw (formerly)FamilyEach otherFriendsPartnership:Kymraw(former employer)MysticonsZarya MoonwolfPiper WillowbrookPrincess Arkayna GoodfeyEmerald Zirconia GoldenbraidGenderFemaleClutch and Throttleare fraternal elven twinsare elf fraternal twin sisters who debuted inVolume 1of the new graphic novel series ofMysticons. They are the first brand-new characters to appear in the comic series. Kymraw(former employer)Mysticons Both have pale orange skin tone and pointy elf ears. Both elves have heterochromia; their left eyes are pink and their right eyes are yellowish green. Throttle has short bubblegum pink hair and green face paint over her right eye. Clutch has long and shaggy pale green hair with pink face paint over her left eye.

characters.description: DeevaMysticon RolePet fox ofthe VexiconsEvil counterpart of the fozChokoFamilyThe Vexicons:Mallory (best friend of sorts)KashaWillaEarthaOthersProxima Starfall(creator/"mother")FriendsKymraw(temporary partner)Enemies:The MysticonsChoko(light counterpart)Queen GoodfeyStormyGenderFemaleDeevais a small, pale blue-green fox that was created from the evil magic ofProxima's Dark Codex. She appears mostly as a muffler on the neck of Mallory, leader of the Vexicons, and is the evil counterpart of Choko. Her tail is strong enough to push objects out her way, and is quite agile and acrobatic. Others Enemies:

characters.name: Emerald Goldenbraid
characters.description: Emerald Zirconia GoldenbraidMysticonsMysticon RoleMysticon KnightElder sister ofHalite and Ferrus GoldenbraidRoyal Griffin Wrangler (formerly)Mysticon AnimalPink UnicornAcquaintancesFriendsPrincess Arkayna Goodfey(best friend)Zarya MoonwolfPiper WillowbrookMalvaronDoug HadderstormChokoProxima StarfallKasey BoonFamilyUnnamed grandmother (deceased)Citrine Goldenbraid(mother)Malachite Goldenbraid(father)Halite and Ferrus Goldenbraid(younger twin brothers)PersonalGenderFemaleAge14LookHairBlondeEyesDark PurpleAppearancesFirst"Sisters in Arms"Last"Age of Dragons" "Emerald's got a big heart." -Female announcer of the new show She has a big heart and is very smart in figuring difficult things out, create complex machinery and gadgets from her knowledge and expertise of dwarven technology, which she learned from her father Malachite. She can be quite gullible and easy to deceive, falling for Kasey Boon; oblivious to the fact that he had been using her to track the Mysticons' every move via tracking bracelet. She had also believedAdakite Flowstone's tale of being a disembodied spirit; disregarding her instincts.

characters.name: Eric Hysteria
characters.description: Eric HysteriaMysticon RoleEstranged husband of Vanity CastleFrequent player onMachinationsFamilyVanity Castle(estranged wife)Felix(son)GenderMaleEric Hysteriais a new minor character who debuted in a flashback ofVolume 2; the comic book series ofMysticons. He was/is longtime rival ofVanity Castle, the producer ofMachinationsgame show, and he had fall in in love with her, and she with him. Like his wife and son, he has pale brown skin and elfin ears.

characters.name: Fatcat Merchant
characters.description: TheFatcat Merchantis a minor character of Mysticons. He first appears inSisters in Arms. He is voiced byMac Heywood. He is a male felinoid. He steals from a beggar man inSisters in Armsand in turn was the target of theft byZarya MoonwolfandPiper Willowbrook, who liberated food from his warehouse to give to the kids on the streets. He was again briefly seen at the start ofAn Eye for an Eye.

characters.name: Felix Castle
characters.description: Felix CastleMysticon RoleInventor of the "Machinations" Video GameFamilyEric Hysteria(long-lost father)Vanity Castle(mother)FriendsSakie(ex-girlfriend)MysticonsPiper(fellow elf)Emerald(competitor & crush)Princess ArkaynaZaryaKittyKaseyAdversariesThe Mysticons (formerly)GenderMaleFelix Breazeal Castleis a new character debuting in the graphic novel series ofMysticonsas opposed to the animated series. He is the first teenage-looking male elf to be introduced. He debuted inVolume 2where he serves as the main antagonist. Mysticons Adversaries

characters.name: Gandobi
characters.description: GandobiMysticon RoleTop-level AstromancerFamilyUnkownFriendsNova Terron(close friend)QuazalaMalvaronTazma(formerly)Proxima(formerly)GenderMaleGandobiis one of many top-levelAstromancerswho serves underNova Terronat the Astromancer Academy. He is supremely strong in high magics. He is eventually overpowered and turned into a masked, mindlessSpectromancerby his former fellow student: Proxima, who has him follow her from now on. He is voiced by Sean Cullen.

characters.name: Gawayne's Butler
characters.description: Gawayne's ButlerMysticon RoleMain manservant and personal valet to Gawayne, during his time as acting King of Gemina.FamilyUnknownFriendsKing DariusQueen GoodfeyRoyal GuardsGenderMaleGawayne's Butleris a supporting character of Mysticons. He first appears in "The Coronation".  As part of the staff who serves the royal family, he may have friends who work with him, but have never been introduced as such. He probably continues to severe Gawayne, but not as much, now that the King and Queen are finally back to ruling the realm. He is voiced byJamie Watson.

characters.name: General Tibion
characters.description: General TibionMysticon RoleGeneral of the Skeleton/Spectral ArmyEnemy of the original MysticonsFamilyOther Skeletons/SpectersFriendsQueen Necrafa(commander)Dreadbane(temporary master)Tazma Grimm(ally)Adakite Flowstone(eventual ally)Fellow SkeletonsOld Enemies:Imani FirewingOriginal Mysticon RangerOriginal Mysticon StrikerOriginal Mysticon KnightNova TerronGandobiQuasarlaAdakite Flowstone(for a time)New Adversaries:Princess ArkaynaZarya MoonwolfPiper WillowbrookEmerald GoldenbraidMalvaron GrimmGenderMaleGeneral Tibionwas an undeadskeletonand an enemy of theMysticons, both old and new. He was a high ranking member of theSpectral Handand was voiced byRon Rubin. Tibion stood out from the rest of the Skeleton Army, wearing a helmet with curving horns. Old Enemies: New Adversaries: Tibion was a devoted member of theSpectral Hand, following Necrafa without hesitation and wanting theMysticonsdestroyed. Although he acted ruthless toward the heroes, he was extremely fearful of theSpectral Dragon, aware of it's power to destroy him. In spite of this fear, he still ended up returning toNecrafainstead of escaping when he had the chance. He also hates wasting time, whileKitty Boontells him that since he's undead, he has all the time in the world.

characters.name: Geraldine Yaga
characters.description: Geraldine YagaMysticon RoleSupremely powerful top-level SorceressFamilyUnknown Sibling(deceased)Tazma(niece)Malvaron(nephew)FriendsMysticonsPrincess ArkaynaZaryaPiperEmeraldOthersProxima(temporary ward)Romances:Nova Terron(longtime starmate)GenderFemaleGeraldine Yagais the adventurous and eccentric aunt ofMalvaronandTazma. According to her nephew, she likes to bump around from dimension to dimension and rest in Centaur Park once a year. It is her the Mysticons go to for help whenZaryais hit by one of Tazma's spells, hoping that she will reverse it. Others Romances:

characters.name: Gnomez II Men
characters.description: Gnomez II Menis a boyband music group mentioned on TV as performing inDrake CityatThe CoronationofGawayne. BothPiper WillowbrookandEmerald Goldenbraidare very excited to see them perform.
